title: ExtensionServiceDeployInput
description: Stage-2 deploy payload and handlers GitHub Environment source. Deploy merges VARS + SECRETS into Lambda/ECS runtime except AWS_GITHUB_OIDC_ROLE_ARN.

VARS.description: Variables for GitHub Environment and Lambda/ECS runtime (merged at deploy).

SECRETS.description: GitHub Environment secrets. AWS_GITHUB_OIDC_ROLE_ARN is CI-only (not injected into Lambda/ECS). Other keys (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY) are merged into runtime env at deploy.
